description: Golden design-brief prompts that should retrieve a compact bundle of recipes for autonomous AoE2 feature planning.

cases.query: Design a class-based RPG town scenario idea with NPC quest givers, quest progression, class progression, and data-driven class stat scaling.
Design a boss dungeon map idea with staged boss phases, checkpoint resets, reward tables, and boss reward payout.
Design a survival arena scenario idea with enemy waves, recurring global announcements, reward tables, and a checkpoint fail reset flow.
Design a civilization-specific custom unit project where a tech unlocks a trained unit with its own production chain and custom resource costs.
